classes.reasoning: Document explicitly titled 'INFORMED CONSENT FORM' with signature blocks, consent declaration checkboxes, participant and investigator signatures, and all structural elements typical of an ICF. Contains signed consent from participant MARIA GARCIA LOPEZ dated 14/08/2024.

indication: familial high cholesterol in patients who cannot take statins
summary: This is an Informed Consent Form (ICF) version 2.0 dated 20 September 2024 for study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007, testing BRC-883 (Cardanezumab) for lowering LDL cholesterol in patients with familial hypercholesterolemia who cannot take statins. The document contains a signed patient consent declaration from participant MARIA GARCIA LOPEZ dated 14/08/2024, with a CRA query noting dating and site identification inconsistencies that require investigator clarification.
references_to: safety update in the ongoing Phase III study
